description_long: This object is a realistic representation of a single slice of bread, featuring a light beige, porous interior and a darker brown crust that wraps around the top and sides. The crumb texture is uneven and spongy, with small air pockets distributed throughout, typical of a standard loaf of white or wheat sandwich bread. The crust is slightly glossy and has a rough, pebbled appearance, suggesting it was baked in a conventional oven. The slice is rectangular with a rounded top, and the edges are well-defined, indicating it was cut cleanly from a loaf. There are no visible seeds, flour dusting, or decorative scoring on the crust. The object is unsliced beyond this single piece and shows no branding or packaging.
description: A single, unsliced slice of bread with a light, porous interior and a dark brown, rough-textured crust.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full face of the bread slice, highlighting the porous, beige crumb and the rounded, dark brown crust.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the thinness of the slice and the continuous, rough brown crust along the edge.
description_view_2: Back view is nearly identical to the front, displaying the same crumb texture and crust shape.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the narrow profile and the crust's rough, glossy surface.
attribute_crust_pattern: The crust is a continuous, dark brown band with a rough, pebbled texture and a slight gloss. There are no visible seeds, flour dusting, or decorative scoring.
